category_sources: source_facts.description says all-in-one OpenAPI utility; official Redocly docs describe CLI for OpenAPI descriptions, API linting, bundling, and governance.
display_name_sources: Official docs page title is Redocly CLI; source_facts.name is redocly-cli.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Redocly CLI docs; official docs include command documentation under /docs/cli/commands/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Redocly docs say the source code is available on GitHub, and the official GitHub repository is Redocly/redocly-cli.
tags_sources: Official Redocly docs describe OpenAPI descriptions, developer portals, API linting, enhancement, bundling, and API governance.
